de: Waldbrand im Tourismusparadies: Tausende Menschen wurden evakuiert. Die seit Tagen wütenden Waldbrände in der Toskana, dem Tourismusparadies Italiens, haben ein kritisches Ausmaß erreicht. Während mehr als 3.500 Menschen evakuiert werden mussten, weil sich die Flammen zwischen Pisa und Lucca schnell ausbreiteten, gestalteten sich die Löscharbeiten aufgrund der starken Windeinwirkung schwierig.
title: Turizm cennetinde orman yangını: Binlerce kişi tahliye edildi

en: Forest fire in the tourism paradise: Thousands of people were evacuated. Forest fires that have been raging for days in Tuscany, Italy's tourism paradise, have reached critical levels. While more than 3,500 people were evacuated due to the flames spreading rapidly between Pisa and Lucca, extinguishing efforts became difficult due to the effect of the wind.

Dum plus quam mille trecenti homines ex flammis rapide inter Pisas et Lucam emissi sunt, exstinguendi conatus difficulter ob effectum venti evaserunt.

en: Struggle for survival in a cosmopolitical district: The drama under the blanket. 75-year-old Orhan Kılıç, who has been struggling to survive in a doorless and cold slum among garbage heaps for years in Şişli, Istanbul, clung to life again with the help extended by Hakkı Korkut, the neighborhood's "Poğaçacı brother".

en: Flooded from drought: Heavy rains swallowed two villages in Hatay. Reyhanlı Dam, which reached full capacity due to excessive rainfall in Hatay, flooded the villages of Karakaya and Acer, which had been evacuated in the past. Striking scenes were created with the rise of water in the region, which suffered from drought last year.
la: Inundata ex siccitate: Imbres graves duas villas in Hatay deglutiverunt. Reyhanlı Dam, quae plenam facultatem ob nimiam pluviam in Hatay attigit, villas Karakaya et Acer inundavit, quae antehac evacuatae erant. scaenae laetissimae cum aquae in regione ortum creatae sunt, quae superiore anno siccitate laborabant.

de: Von der Dürre zum Überfluss: Ekşili-Teich. Der Ekşili-Teich in Antalya, der letztes Jahr aufgrund von Dürre und unbewusster Bewässerung auf Drohnenbildern als „verödet“ zu sehen war, war dieses Jahr durch die starken Regenfälle vollständig gefüllt.

en: From drought to abundance: Ekşili Pond. Ekşili Pond in Antalya, which was reflected in drone images as "desertified" last year due to drought and unconscious irrigation, was completely filled with this year's heavy rains.

de: Zum Jahresende wird es noch weiter steigen: Die Kaffeepreise sind in den letzten 4 Jahren um 780 Prozent gestiegen. Aufgrund der Zölle und der Dürre in Brasilien haben die Kaffeepreise ein Rekordniveau erreicht. In der Türkei hat Filterkaffee die Grenze von 110 TL und türkischer Kaffee die Grenze von 200 TL erreicht. Es wird erwartet, dass die Zahlen bis zum Jahresende weiter steigen.
title: Yıl sonunda daha da artacak: Kahve fiyatları son 4 yılda yüzde 780 zamlandı
description: Kahve fiyatları, tarifeler ve Brezilya'daki kuraklık nedeniyle rekor seviyeye yaklaştı. Türkiye'de ise filtre kahve 110 TL’ye, Türk kahvesi ise 200 TL sınırına dayandı. Rakamların yıl sonunda daha da artması bekleniyor.
en: It will increase even more at the end of the year: Coffee prices have increased by 780 percent in the last 4 years. Coffee prices have reached record levels due to tariffs and drought in Brazil. In Türkiye, filter coffee has reached the limit of 110 TL and Turkish coffee has reached the limit of 200 TL. The numbers are expected to increase further by the end of the year.
la: Plus etiam in fine anni crescet: Coffee pretia aucta sunt 780 cento in proximis 4 annis. Pretia capulus pervenerunt ex portoriis et siccitatibus in Brasilia recordum gradus. In Türkiye, colum capulus limitem 110 TL et capulus Turcicum pervenit ad limitem 200 TL. Numeri a fine anni longius augeri exspectantur.

de: Dieses Mal kommt El Nino „Super“: Dürre, Hitze, Sturm ... Wann wird es Türkiye erreichen? El Nino, das die Temperaturen enorm ansteigen lässt und Dürren, Hungersnöte sowie Hurrikane und Stürme verursacht, wird dieses Mal mit dem Adjektiv „super“ versehen. Experten fordern Vorkehrungen für El Niño, das auch Türkiye treffen wird.
title: El Nino bu kez 'Süper' geliyor: Kuraklık, sıcak, fırtına... Türkiye'yi ne zaman vuracak
description: Sıcaklıkları akıl almaz derecede artırıp kuraklıklara, kıtlıklara aynı zamanda da kasırga ve fırtınalara neden olan El Nino, bu kez 'süper' sıfatıyla da geliyor. Türkiye'ye de uğrayacak olan El Nino için uzmanlar önlem çağrısında bulunuyor.
en: This time El Nino is coming 'Super': Drought, heat, storm... When will it hit Türkiye? El Nino, which increases temperatures incredibly and causes droughts, famines, as well as hurricanes and storms, this time comes with the adjective of 'super'. Experts are calling for precautions for El Niño, which will also affect Türkiye.
la: Hoc tempore El Nino venit Super: Siccitas, aestus, tempestas... Quando Türkiye percutiet? El Nino, quae calores incredibiliter auget et siccitates, fames, ac procellas et procellas causat, hoc tempus venit cum adiectivo "super". Periti rogant cautiones pro El Niño, quae etiam Türkiye afficiunt.

Der im Südosten wirksame „Superzellen“-Sturm verursachte an vielen Stellen große Schäden, insbesondere in Gaziantep und Şanlıurfa. Während Dutzende Menschen durch Tornados, Hagel und Regenfälle verletzt wurden, kam ein Mensch ums Leben und in vielen Schulen wurde der Unterricht eingestellt.

de: Was ist dieses natürliche Phänomen der Superzellen? Es deckt sogar Stürme in den USA ab. Der „Superzellen“-Sturm, der besonders im Marmaragebiet und im Südosten der Türkei wütet, gibt Anlass zur Sorge. Was ist dieses System, das sich durch Starkregen, Hagel, Überschwemmungen und Wind bemerkbar macht, und wie entsteht es? Nach Expertenwarnungen richteten sich erneut alle Augen auf dieses gefährliche Wetterereignis.

en: What is this super cell natural phenomenon? It even covers storms in the USA. The "super cell" storm that is especially effective in Marmara and the Southeast in Turkey creates concern. de: Wie ist die Superzelle entstanden? Experten machten auf das überraschende meteorologische Bild aufmerksam. Experten gaben an, dass der Superzellensturm in Gaziantep und der Schneefall im Mai in Adana durch das Frontalsystem verursacht wurden, in dem heiße und kalte Luftmassen kollidieren, und wiesen darauf hin, dass der Klimawandel solche Ereignisse verstärkt.
title: Süper hücre nasıl oluştu? Şaşırtan meteorolojik tabloya uzmanlar dikkat çekti
description: Gaziantep’teki süper hücre fırtınası ve Adana’daki mayıs karının sıcak-soğuk hava kütlelerinin çarpıştığı cephesel sistemden kaynaklandığını belirten uzmanlar, iklim değişikliğinin bu tür olayları güçlendirdiğine dikkat çekti.
en: How did the supercell form? Experts drew attention to the surprising meteorological picture. Experts stated that the super cell storm in Gaziantep and the May snow in Adana were caused by the frontal system where hot and cold air masses collide, and pointed out that climate change strengthens such events.
la: Quomodo forma supercell? Periti animum induxerunt ad picturam meeorologicam mirandam. Periti affirmaverunt tempestatem cellam eximius in Gaziantep et May nix in Adana a systemate frontali causari ubi massae aeris calidi et frigidi colliduntur, et ostendunt mutationem climatis tales eventus roborare.

en: Is 'Super El Nino' ​​really coming?. Climate scientists speaking to the BBC say that one should be cautious about predictions. Their reason is the uncertainty about how strong El Nino will be and thus how much the world's climate and weather will be affected.

de: AKOM warnte Istanbul Stunde für Stunde, dass es gefrieren würde und es wie Überschwemmungen regnen würde. Das Katastrophenkoordinierungszentrum der Stadtverwaltung von Istanbul (AKOM) warnte die Bewohner Istanbuls am Donnerstag, dem 14. Mai, vor plötzlichen Temperaturabfällen und Gewittern.
title: AKOM İstanbul'u saat saat uyardı, buz kesecek, sağanak yağmur sel gibi yağacak
description: İstanbul Büyükşehir Belediyesi Afet Koordinasyon Merkezi (AKOM), 14 Mayıs Perşembe günü için İstanbulluları ani sıcaklık düşüşlerine ve gök gürültülü sağanak yağışlara karşı uyardı.
en: AKOM warned Istanbul hour by hour that it would freeze and rain would fall like floods. Istanbul Metropolitan Municipality Disaster Coordination Center (AKOM) warned Istanbulites against sudden temperature drops and thunderstorms on Thursday, May 14.
la: Horas Istanbul AKOM monuit ut alget et pluviae sicut inundationes caderent. Istanbul Metropolitanus Municipality Disaster Coordinatio Centre (AKOM) monuit Istanbulitas contra guttas et tonitrua subitis temperaturas die Iovis, die 14 mensis Maii.
content:

de: Erschreckendes Erdbeben in Adana. Nach Angaben der AFAD ereignete sich nachts im Bezirk Saimbeyli in Adana ein Erdbeben der Stärke 4,9. Das Beben, das in einer Tiefe von 8,6 Kilometern unter der Erde aufgezeichnet wurde, war auch in den umliegenden Provinzen zu spüren.
title: Adana’da korkutan deprem
description: AFAD’ın verilerine göre Adana’nın Saimbeyli ilçesinde gece saatlerinde 4,9 büyüklüğünde deprem meydana geldi. Yerin 8,6 kilometre derinliğinde kaydedilen sarsıntı çevre illerde de hissedildi.
en: Frightening earthquake in Adana. According to AFAD's data, a 4.9 magnitude earthquake occurred in Adana's Saimbeyli district at night. The tremor, which was recorded at a depth of 8.6 kilometers underground, was also felt in surrounding provinces.
la: Terribilis terrae motus in Adana. Secundum notitias AFAD, magnitudo 4.9 terrae motus in regione Adana Saimbeyli nocte facta est. Tremor, qui in altitudinem 8.6 chiliometrorum subterranei commemoratur, in provinciis circumiacentibus etiam sensit.

de: Die Züchter schlugen Alarm: Kangals wurden depressiv. Das instabile Wetter in Sivas, an einem Tag heiß und am anderen kalt, machte die weltberühmten Kangal-Hunde deprimiert. Züchter gaben an, dass Kangals unglücklich und unruhig seien.
title: Yetiştiriciler alarm verdi: Kangallar depresyona girdi
description: Sivas'ta bir gün sıcak bir gün soğuk giden dengesiz havalar, dünyaca ünlü Kangal köpeklerini depresyona soktu. Yetiştiriciler, Kangalların mutsuz ve huzursuz olduğunu belirtti.
en: Breeders sounded the alarm: Kangals became depressed. The unstable weather in Sivas, one day hot and the other cold, made the world-famous Kangal dogs depressed. Breeders stated that Kangals were unhappy and restless.

de: Der Winter hat sich in Kars verlängert, die Aussaat hat sich verzögert: Landwirte sind in Alarmbereitschaft. Der verlängerte Winter und das kalte Wetter in Kars verzögerten den Landwirtschaftskalender. Der Pflanzvorgang, der im Mai statt im April begann, brachte die Landwirte in eine schwierige Situation. Während die Arbeit durch gemeinsame Arbeit beschleunigt wird, ist auch mit einer Verzögerung der Ernte zu rechnen.
title: Kars’ta kış uzadı, ekim gecikti: Çiftçiler alarmda
description: Kars’ta uzayan kış ve soğuk hava tarım takvimini geciktirdi. Nisan yerine mayısta başlayan ekim süreci, çiftçileri zor durumda bıraktı. İmece usulüyle çalışmalar hızlandırılırken, hasadın da gecikmesi bekleniyor.
en: Winter has lengthened in Kars, planting has been delayed: Farmers are on alert. The extended winter and cold weather in Kars delayed the agricultural calendar. The planting process, which started in May instead of April, left farmers in a difficult situation. While the work is being accelerated through collective work, the harvest is also expected to be delayed.
la: Hiems in Kars longius processit, plantatio mora est: agricolae intenti sunt. Protracta hiems et frigora in Kars calendarium agriculturae morabantur. Processus plantationis, qui mense Maio loco Aprili incepit, agricolae in difficili condicione discesserunt. Dum opus per collectivum opus acceleratur, messis etiam differenda expectatur.
